text.title: GitHub Actions — Workflow Structure Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on job count + trigger diversity + concurrency need.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: map-triggers
step.action: List required events; add path/branch filters.

step.name: model-jobs-as-dag
step.action: List jobs with needs; identify parallelisable branches.

step.name: attach-concurrency-and-envs
step.action: Set concurrency per context; wire environment protection.

step.name: schedule-and-validate
step.action: Define UTC cron + dispatch; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
